verses.text: I wrote 'out of much affliction,' not to grieve you, but that ye might know my abundant love. Loving correction. His sharp words sprang from deep love.
I wrote 'out of much affliction,' not to grieve you, but that ye might know my abundant love. Loving correction. His sharp words sprang from deep love.
I wrote 'out of much affliction,' not to grieve you, but that ye might know my abundant love. Loving correction. His sharp words sprang from deep love.
I wrote 'out of much affliction,' not to grieve you, but that ye might know my abundant love. Loving correction. His sharp words sprang from deep love.
Forgive and comfort the offender, lest he be 'swallowed up with overmuch sorrow'; confirm your love. Restore the penitent. Discipline aims at recovery, not ruin.

Forgive and comfort the offender, lest he be 'swallowed up with overmuch sorrow'; confirm your love. Restore the penitent. Discipline aims at recovery, not ruin.
I forgive, 'lest Satan should get an advantage'; we are not ignorant of his devices. Beware the foe. Unforgiveness gives the enemy a foothold.

I forgive, 'lest Satan should get an advantage'; we are not ignorant of his devices. Beware the foe. Unforgiveness gives the enemy a foothold.
A door opened at Troas, but I had no rest, not finding Titus. Anxious love. His care for the church robbed him of peace.
A door opened at Troas, but I had no rest, not finding Titus. Anxious love. His care for the church robbed him of peace.
God leads us in triumph, making manifest 'the savour of his knowledge'; we are a sweet savour. Christ's fragrance. The gospel is life to some, death to others.

We are not as many that 'corrupt the word,' but speak in sincerity before God. Honest ministry. He handles God's word with integrity, not gain.
